---
title: "Notes"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false

format:
  html:
    pagetitle: "Tiffany Le | Notes"
---

A place to store some of the notes I've taken and cleaned up, from class or otherwise. 

I can't guarantee the correctness of any of these, so, if you see something is amiss, please feel free to [report it on GitHub](https://github.com/tiffanynle/tiffanynle.github.io/issues/new).
